title: End dates are not showing up in my synced Google Calendar
excerpt: Hello.  I have synced my Monday to my google calendar.  Start and End dates BOTH show on my calendar, but not my bosses. I know we could add “timeline” as a column, but that is an extra unnecessary step. I know there is …

posts.author: methridge (Monica Ethridge)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. I have synced my Monday to my google calendar. Start and End dates BOTH show on my calendar, but not my bosses. I know we could add “timeline” as a column, but that is an extra unnecessary step. I know there is an app that would auto link start/end dates=timeline, don’t want that either. Any reason why her end dates are not showing on her synced google calendar?
